title: Patch Risk Auditor
safeFraming: A safe open-source defensive method for auditing synthetic software patch-risk records.

issuesDetected.description: Patch adds dependencies requiring provenance review.
Patch adds an install-time script requiring defensive review.
Patch includes dynamic evaluation pattern in synthetic sample.
Code changed without matching test changes.
Patch provenance is weak or unverified.

disclaimer: This is an autonomous open-research artifact. It is not a patent filing, patentability opinion, legal novelty opinion, or freedom-to-operate opinion. It was published automatically after automated policy gates and still requires human interpretation before use.
